newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Recent multicore-fiber items (industry MCF-standard collaboration with Fujikura/Corning; Optoscribe fan-in/fan-out deal) are Feb-March 2026. Stock hit an all-time high June 3; next earnings Aug 5. The +4.6% move since June 9 is sector flow, not a fresh catalyst.

sources.label: Sumitomo Electric - multicore fiber AI data center collaboration
optics.org - Optoscribe x Sumitomo Electric data centers

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha-vs-passives lens: power-cable/optical leverage intact but the name sits a step removed from the core passive/power bottleneck stack. No new evidence since June 9; +4.6% is flow. Asymmetry essentially unchanged; rank stands.
verdicts.bull: Power cable + multicore fiber + optical interconnect leverage to AI campuses.
verdicts.neutral: Conglomerate; one step removed from the core passive/power choke point.
verdicts.bear: Diversified end-markets dilute AI pure-play; ATH June 3.

verdicts.rankRationale: Connectivity/photonics: multicore-fiber and electrification exposure unchanged since June 9; MCF-standard and Optoscribe items are Feb-March news. Conglomerate complexity still tempers upside. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Multicore fiber leadership; grid/auto recovery optionality; telecom demand.
verdicts.neutral: Broad supplier; AI fiber is a slice of the mix.
verdicts.bear: Complexity caps re-rating; +88% YTD already moves it off-cheap.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Multicore fiber adoption in AI campuses

verdicts.rankRationale: Master list, optical/networking bucket: down-move on rerating discipline already taken June 9; no new information since, only flow. Re-penalizing would double-count. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Scale-out optics + power leverage; sector pricing power read-through.
